latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: dimension density, dimension lanes, title/notes placement, and visual balance remain different.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The expected views are present, but the generated layout is still visually dominated by right-side dimensions and a diagonal cross-region dimension line.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The drawing still has too many visible DisplayDims compared with the reference and keeps a dense right-side/top-view stack.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text and leaders remain clustered around the top/right region, and the long diagonal/cross-region dimension makes the sheet difficult to read.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The title/data text area is still larger and differently placed than the compact reference title area.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference manufacturing note block.

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the same-name reference.
The run uses current-run generated PNG evidence from drw_output/runs/e2059740eb5b.
The previous lane fix did not eliminate the far-right callout stack in the actual generated drawing; dimension_arrange.json still reports right_callout lanes.
DisplayDim lifecycle also remains non-passing due display_dim_lifecycle_count_regression.
API metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review is the final gate and is FAIL.

correction_actions.source_note: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: dimension density, dimension lanes, title/notes placement, and visual balance remain different.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: The expected views are present, but the generated layout is still visually dominated by right-side dimensions and a diagonal cross-region dimension line.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: The drawing still has too many visible DisplayDims compared with the reference and keeps a dense right-side/top-view stack.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimension text and leaders remain clustered around the top/right region, and the long diagonal/cross-region dimension makes the sheet difficult to read.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: The title/data text area is still larger and differently placed than the compact reference title area.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference manufacturing note block.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.

current_006_ui_verdict.latest_manual_required_correction: Fix the actual dimension-arrange path used by the generator so top-view reference dimensions cannot be assigned to far-right callout lanes, then reduce final real DisplayDim count toward the 12 reference targets without losing coverage before another locked 006-only CAD rerun.
